analysis: This week has 129 tasks due across 10 projects, with 132 tasks already overdue from previous weeks. That's a combined load of 261 items the team needs to manage.
🌧️ **Weather note:** 1 day with possible rain. Not a full stop but PMs should monitor conditions, especially for the 23 outdoor tasks due this week.
⛔ **6 tasks are blocked** by overdue dependencies. These can't move until their prerequisites are done. The PMs responsible should treat those blockers as their #1 priority this week.

💰 **Payment chain alert:** 38 payments across all projects are effectively blocked because the work that needs to happen before them is overdue. Even though the payment dates look fine in the schedule, these payments CANNOT happen until the prerequisite work is done.
Of those, 6 are **client income payments** ($56,947). This is money that won't come in until the blocking work is cleared.
32 are **sub/material payments** ($43,668) — the work isn't done so these shouldn't be paid yet either.
🚨 **Income at risk:** 6 client payments ($56,947) are blocked by overdue work. Do NOT delay the tasks that lead to these payments — they're your path to cash.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522)** has the heaviest load: 21 tasks due. With 12 already overdue, the PM needs to ruthlessly prioritize.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton** has the heaviest load: 17 tasks due. With 11 already overdue, the PM needs to ruthlessly prioritize.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)** has the heaviest load: 15 tasks due. With 19 already overdue, the PM needs to ruthlessly prioritize.
